_schema_meta.source_document: Policy Schedule — Gupta Prasad Satapathy — Period 01/02/2026 to 31/01/2027
_schema_meta.notes: User-specific schedule data only. Product rules are in product_library_hdfc_optima_restore.json. Derived insights are computed at runtime by the Ezer Insight Engine by joining this file with the product library.

policy_meta.issuing_office: 2nd Floor, OSCU Complex, Samabaya Bhawan, Unit 9, Janpath, Khorda

sum_insured.multiplier_benefit_note: 10 years continuous coverage — Multiplier has reached 100% maximum. No further growth possible.
sum_insured.per_claim_ceiling_note: Single claim cannot exceed Base SI + Multiplier Benefit = ₹20L. If base exhausted, Restore gives another ₹10L for subsequent claims but per-claim cap still applies.
sum_insured.effective_annual_coverage_note: Base ₹10L + Multiplier ₹10L + one Restore trigger ₹10L = ₹30L maximum across multiple claims in a policy year

specific_disease_24_month_waiting.reason: 10 years continuous coverage — 24 months fully served

ped_36_month_waiting.reason: 10 years continuous coverage — 36 months fully served

declared_peds.coverage_note: Fully covered on entire ₹10L base SI. No restrictions.

icd_codes.description: Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with renal complications
Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with ophthalmic complications
Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with neurological complications
Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with peripheral circulatory complications
Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with other specified complications
Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with multiple complications
Non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus with unspecified complications

declared_peds.coverage_note: All ICD-10 sub-codes explicitly accepted. Diabetic nephropathy, retinopathy, neuropathy, vascular disease all within scope.

icd_codes.description: Other heart disorders in diseases classified elsewhere
Other and unspecified disorders of circulatory system

declared_peds.icd_specificity: none — HDFC ERGO confirmed no specific ICD code available for this condition
declared_peds.endorsement_context: Condition discovered during Urolift surgery hospitalisation July 2025. Mid-policy endorsement forced by Badal Satapathy. HDFC ERGO initially reluctant but endorsement completed.
declared_peds.waiting_period_status: moratorium_active — insurer cannot deny on non-disclosure grounds
declared_peds.coverage_note: Insurer explicitly accepted via endorsement. Moratorium (10 years active) prevents non-disclosure denial. ICD codes are vague catch-all — written confirmation of broad coverage scope should be obtained before cardiac hospitalisation.

ezer_flags.description: HDFC ERGO confirmed no specific ICD code exists. Catch-all acceptance is broad but unspecific. At claim time for a specific cardiac event, insurer may attempt to argue specificity mismatch. Obtain written confirmation of broad scope coverage.

schedule_of_benefits.emergency_air_ambulance: Covered upto Rs. 2.5L per hospitalisation, maximum upto SI in a year
schedule_of_benefits.restore_benefit: 100% of Basic SI — for any illness or any insured person
schedule_of_benefits.multiplier_benefit: 50% of Basic SI post each policy year irrespective of claims, maximum 100%

special_conditions.waiting_period_waivers: All waiting periods fully waived — 10 years continuous coverage
